description:

name: single-lead-sequential-build
description: Single-lead single-builder pattern works well for sequential 16-commit builds from a detailed spec. Lead spawned 1 builder, builder completed all commits in ~15min, lead spawned reviewer for verification, then sent merge_ready. Total wall time ~25min from lead dispatch to merge.
